name: Baida Paratha
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift whole wheat flour into a bowl with 2 teaspoons salt.
2. Gradually add water, making a stiff dough. Cover with a damp cloth and let rest for 20 minutes.
3. Boil eggs and mash well.
4. Add the mashed eggs to the flour mixture along with 1/2 teaspoon pepper, chopped coriander, and 2 tablespoons ghee or oil. Mix thoroughly until smooth.
5. Divide the dough into 8 equal parts. Roll each part out into a circle of about 4 inches in diameter.
6. Place 1 tablespoon of egg filling in the center of each circle.
7. Shape them back into round balls.
8. Roll out each ball on a floured board to form a circle that is approximately 5 inches (13 cm) in diameter.
9. Rub a little ghee or oil on one side of each paratha.
10. Heat a griddle and shallow fry each paratha with some ghee or oil, flipping once or twice until both sides are golden brown.
